item.title: This has a serious present danger to every single Iranian immigrant in the United Kingdom and every single person who would ever...
item.description:
This has a serious present danger to every single Iranian immigrant in the United Kingdom and every single person who would ever visit or have relations with anyone that lives there. This is on a scale that has yet to be seen in such a overarching and mass policing state.



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: There is no way to separate the v**lence you enact upon Palestinians and it is your job to proliferate against your neighbors, a...
item.description:
There is no way to separate the v**lence you enact upon Palestinians and it is your job to proliferate against your neighbors, and that exact same v**lence that will be repeated internal of that very system. If you genuinely care about safety as I actually do trust you do, the only solution is to dismantle all systems of oppression like the ones you uphold



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: Ian Smith made this argument openly and actively, but instead of denying the indigeneity of the native people, he demonise it an...
item.description:
Ian Smith made this argument openly and actively, but instead of denying the indigeneity of the native people, he demonise it and the Israelis have only slightly changed that into denying it.



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: oliviajulianna still waiting on the answer “progressive organizer” for … what exactly?
item.description:
oliviajulianna still waiting on the answer “progressive organizer” for … what exactly? - and to the general audience, it bears repeating that this is not full proof and I’m not suggesting all anti-capitalists are on the left, but rather the inverse - you are not on the left if you are not anti-capitalist.



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: It is not in fact amazing that the king has a billion new plots of land
item.description:
It is not in fact amazing that the king has a billion new plots of land. No , I don’t appreciate his serf count doubling.



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)
